name: Fruit Puffed Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 package One-step angel food cake mix
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 400 degrees. Combine cake mix and water. Stir in fruit and nuts. Cover cookie sheet with foil. Drop cookies by rounded teaspoonfuls onto foil. Bake 8 to 10 minutes, until cookies become puffed and golden. Let cool; remove from foil using a metal spatula. Yield: 3 dozen cookies.
